subject: verify cache invalidation

claims.text: The unpreregistered manual run returned fresh data.
A write invalidates every subsequent public-API read.
claims.disconfirming_observation: a stale public-API read after the write

experiment.prediction: the next public-API read returns the written value
experiment.disconfirming_observation: the next read returns the prior value
experiment.test: rerun write/read after recording this prediction

control_reason: The first result is weaker because its prediction was written afterward.
action: Preregister the prediction and disconfirming observation, then rerun the bounded test.
